creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:
I'm getting a handful of failures trying to upgrade pieces of qt6 after this change on FreeBSD 13.3-stable.

Two notable issues seem to be pkg-plist problems:

===>   Registering installation for qt6-tools-6.7.0 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/qt6-tools/work/stage/usr/local/bin/qdistancefieldgenerator6:No such file or directory

At this point, I have several qt6 packages I can't get upgraded because of the above:
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! devel/qt6-tools (qt6-tools-6.6.3)     (install error)
        ! x11-toolkits/qt6-quicktimeline (qt6-quicktimeline-6.6.3)      (unknown build error)
        * x11-toolkits/qt6-quick3d (qt6-quick3d-6.6.3)
        * multimedia/qt6-multimedia (qt6-multimedia-6.6.3)
        ! devel/qt6-5compat (qt6-5compat-6.6.3) (install error)


(For reference, my current git clone of /usr/ports is at commit fa16f0ced, and I haven't seen any new commits relevant to qt6 since then)
